DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_JOB]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_JOB]
( 
	[JobID] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[LeadID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CustomerID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[IssuedLeadID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProductID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[JobStatusID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProductionBranchID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[FinanceSourceID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[FinanceCompanyID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[VendorID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InstallerID_1] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InstallerID_2] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InstallerID_3] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InstallerID_4] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[SalesRep1_EmployeeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PaperworkStatusID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[HoldReasonID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ContractID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Commission] [decimal](19,4)  NULL,
	[SalesRepSplit] [float]  NULL,
	[LastModifiedOn] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[MeasuredBy] [int]  NULL,
	[ContractDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[CancelDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[HoldDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[StatusDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[GrossAmount] [decimal](19,4)  NULL,
	[BudgetCost] [decimal](19,4)  NULL,
	[JobNetAmt] [decimal](19,4)  NULL,
	[ActualCost] [decimal](19,4)  NULL,
	[FundedDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[FundedAmount] [decimal](19,4)  NULL,
	[ParAmount] [decimal](19,4)  NULL,
	[FinanceAmount] [decimal](19,4)  NULL,
	[FinanceMonths] [int]  NULL,
	[FinanceApproved] [bit]  NULL,
	[FinanceRate] [float]  NULL,
	[FinanceExpire] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[FinanceFee] [decimal](19,4)  NULL,
	[Purchaser] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ARIssue] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[FinanceHomeValue] [decimal](19,4)  NULL,
	[LP_JobID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_LeadID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_CustomerID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_IssuedLeadID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_ProductID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_JobStatusID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_ProductionBranchID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_FinanceSourceID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_FinanceCompanyID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_VendorID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_InstallerID_1] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_InstallerID_2] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_InstallerID_3] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_InstallerID_4] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_SalesRep2_EmployeeID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_PaperworkStatusID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_HoldReasonID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [JobID] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
